top_signals.title: Stocks Priced for ‘Sunshine and Rainbows’ Now Face Earnings Test
top_signals.summary: Wall Street is anticipating a near-record earnings season, but for investors a key question remains: Will it be enough to keep stock market bulls running?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
